items.title: 'Huge potential for growth' - Newcastle sign Bamba
items.summary: Newcastle have completed the signing of midfielder Aladji Bamba from Monaco.

items.title: Al Hilal complete Summerville signing from West Ham
items.summary: Al Hilal have completed the signing of winger Crysencio Summerville from West Ham in a deal worth up to £60m.

items.title: Newcastle sign Aladji Bamba in £34m deal from Monaco to boost midfield options
items.summary: 20-year-old agrees five-year contract at club Bamba expected to compete with Miley for No 6 role Newcastle have made Aladji Bamba their fourth signing of the summer after the 20-year-old midfielder completed a move from Monaco for a fee that could rise to £34m. “I’m very happy to be here,” said Bamb

items.title: Chelsea exclude TWO new summer signings from pre-season squad to Australia and Asia in worrying start for Xabi Alonso
items.summary: CHELSEA have left TWO new summer signings behind as they travel to their pre-season training camp. The Blues confirmed 27 players had travelled to Sydney for the club's pre-season tour of Australia and Asia. items.title: Andoni Iraola backs backroom staff to help cure Liverpool’s set-piece ills
items.summary: Tommy Elphick and Shaun Cooper to work on set-pieces Iraola felt ‘very lucky’ to work with them at Bournemouth Andoni Iraola has outlined the roles his backroom staff will play in trying to improve Liverpool’s set-piece record next season and admitted he was “very lucky” to inherit a talented coachi

items.title: Rodri’s back surgery outcome to have major knock-on effect over Man Utd and Real Madrid transfers
items.summary: RODRI’S planned back surgery could have a bearing on whether he leaves Manchester City this summer. The 30-year-old is scheduled to go under the knife on Monday and is expected to miss the start of the Premier League season, which gets underway on August 21. items.title: Ian Wright launches Arsenal’s stunning retro away kit as fans say ‘take my money already’
items.summary: ARSENAL fans have told the club to take their money after they drafted in Ian Wright for the Gunners' latest kit launch. items.title: 'Like a movie playing in my head' | Klopp honoured to take Germany job
items.summary: Jurgen Klopp admits he is still coming to terms with being confirmed as the new head coach of the German national team, describing it as 'like a movie in my head'.

items.title: Scott: The 'scrawny-looking kid' turned complete midfielder wanted by the elite
items.summary: Across the seven games in which Bournemouth took points off Arsenal, Manchester City, Manchester United, Liverpool and Chelsea last season, it is telling that Alex Scott was nearly ever-present, playing 625 of a possible 630 minutes.

items.title: Per Mertesacker lands major new job six months on from quitting as Arsenal’s academy chief
items.summary: PER MERTESACKER has landed a job with the German FA after leaving Arsenal. The former defender was the Gunners’ academy manager but left the role at the end of last season. items.title: Chelsea ‘receive £25million offer from club legend for World Cup star with ace keen on transfer’
items.summary: COMO have made another bid for Chelsea defender Trevoh Chalobah - and the player is keen to move, according to reports. Chalobah, 27, has been a big target for Blues legend Cesc Fabregas all summer. But Chelsea are holding out for their academy graduate and want at least £30million. Fabrizio Romano

items.title: Chelsea still £10million short of Rayo Vallecano asking price for Pep Chavarria with LaLiga club standing firm
items.summary: CHELSEA are £10million short of Rayo Vallecano's valuation of defender Pep Chavarria. The Blues have been in talks over a deal for the full-back all summer, with the Spanish club standing firm over their asking price. items.title: Could Adeyemi's Barcelona move see Flick unlock winger's true potential?
items.summary: Perhaps Karim Adeyemi's move to Barcelona should not come as a surprise even if usurping Lamine Yamal as the team's star left-footed right-winger is impossible. After all, it was Hansi Flick, Barca’s head coach, who gave Adeyemi his debut for Germany.

items.title: Guardiola rejects chance to become Italy head coach
items.summary: Pep Guardiola has turned down the chance to take the Italy head coach job, according to Sky in Italy.

items.title: 'I'll walk away!' Klopp sends warning to critics after Germany appointment
items.summary: Jurgen Klopp has warned he will walk away from his new job as Germany's head coach if the German media don't "leave my family in peace".

items.title: Klopp starts Germany reign by threatening to quit
items.summary: Jurgen Klopp starts his reign as Germany's head coach by threatening to quit if the media invades his family's privacy.

items.title: Devlin opens up on 'too stressful' Hearts exit for Rangers
items.summary: Cammy Devlin says it was "too stressful" to head to the World Cup with his club future still to be decided - although the extra time taken did lead to a move to Rangers.
